---
id: put-v-1-employees-employee-id-federal-taxes
title: "Update federal taxes for an employee"
description: "Updates federal tax (W4) information for an employee. Only rev_2020_w4 format is accepted for updates."
sidebar_label: "Update federal taxes for an employee"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "put api-method"
info_path: docs/api/gusto-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Update federal taxes for an employee"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/v1/employees/{employee_uuid}/federal_taxes"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Updates federal tax (W4) information for an employee. Only rev_2020_w4 format is accepted for updates.

scope: `employee_federal_taxes:write`

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
